title: Blockholm
description: The modpack for the blockholm server including mods such as create and farmers delight
body:
### Blockholm Server Pack

Hi and welcome to Blockholm — a vanilla-inspired survival server with a mix of exploration, creativity, and progress!
The modpack has all the required mods to play on the Blockholm multiplayer server as well as world-enriching mods that make Minecraft feel larger, more aesthetically pleasing, and more rewarding — without straying too far from vanilla.

If you’re joining the Blockholm server, you’ll need this pack to connect and experience the world as intended.
Even if you’re not on the server, it also works great as a light survival pack with new biomes, new farming content, and expanded endgame adventures.

## Features

Here’s what this pack brings to the table:

A richer world – Thanks to Biomes O’ Plenty and BetterEnd, you’ll explore beautiful, varied biomes and stunning End dimensions.

Advanced machinery & automation – Build awesome contraptions and machines with Create Fabric.

Improved farming & cooking – Grow, harvest, and craft new dishes with Farmer’s Delight Refabricated.

Enhanced multiplayer – Talk with others easily using Simple Voice Chat — no external software needed!

Adventure & advancement – End Remastered redefines the journey to the End with new challenges and possibilities.

Seamless performance & stability – Built on Fabric API and optimized dependencies for a lag-free, clean game.

# Mods Included

Biomes O' Plenty – v19.0.0.96

Create Fabric – v0.5.1-j-build.1631+mc1.20.1

Simple Voice Chat – vfabric-1.20.1-2.6.6

Farmer's Delight Refabricated – v1.20.1-2.4.0

Fabric API – v0.92.6+1.20.1

BetterEnd – v4.0.11

TerraBlender – v3.0.1.10

End Remastered – v5.2.4

BCLib – v3.0.14

GlitchCore – v0.0.1.1

## Notes

This modpack is designed specifically to be played on the Blockholm multiplayer server,
but should also give a solid semi-vanilla survival experience if you'd rather play single-player.
Client-side mods like JEI, openpac or Jade are recommended but not included.
The server uses Openpac for claims, please note this.

Happy building, crafting, and exploring — looking forward to seeing you in Blockholm!
